title: Tritiya — The Third Day
description: The hardest days are behind you. Your body is beginning to adjust. The mind is restless but you are stronger.
expected_changes: Initial restlessness subsiding, sleep may be disrupted
message: Krishna told Arjuna — the mind is restless, but it can be controlled through practice (abhyasa) and dispassion (vairagya). You proved that today.

title: Saptah Siddhi — One Week
description: You have completed one full cycle. The ancient texts say 7 days establishes the seed of a new samskara.
expected_changes: Better morning energy, slight improvement in focus, more vivid dreams
message: One week of nishkama karma — action without expectation of reward. You did your duty to yourself. That is enough.

title: Ekadashi — The Eleventh Day
description: Ekadashi is sacred in Hindu tradition — a day of purification and fasting. You have purified yourself for 11 continuous days. The mind and body fast together.
expected_changes: Noticeable improvement in mental clarity, voice may feel stronger, eyes brighter
message: Patanjali said — brahmacharya-pratisthayam virya-labhah. When brahmacharya is established, vitality (virya) is gained. You are gaining it now.

title: Paksha — The Fortnight
description: Half a month. Your dopamine pathways are beginning to rewire. The lunar fortnight completes. You are not who you were 14 days ago.
expected_changes: Improved eye contact, reduced anxiety, skin beginning to clear, steadier mood
message: Yuktahara-viharasy — regulated food, regulated movement, regulated sleep. You are living the yogi's life. Two weeks of yukta living changes a man.

title: Triveni — Three Weeks
description: Like the sacred confluence of three rivers at Prayag, three weeks of discipline merge into a flowing stream of will. Modern neuroscience and ancient wisdom agree — 21 days rewires a habit.
expected_changes: Habit formation solidifying, urges significantly reduced, increased social confidence
message: You have slain kama-rupam duraasadam — the formidable foe that is desire — for 21 consecutive days. Arjuna's greatest battle. You are winning yours.

title: Maas Purna — One Month
description: One full lunar cycle. The moon has gone from new to full and back. You have been reborn in discipline. The ancient brahmacharis studied for 12 years — your first month is your foundation.
expected_changes: Deep sleep, glowing skin, magnetic personality beginning to manifest, sharp memory, stronger voice
message: Prajahati yada kaman sarvan — when one abandons all desires. You have abandoned the greatest addictive desire for 30 days. That is sthitaprajna — the steady-minded sage.

title: Mandala — The Sacred Cycle
description: 40 days is a Mandala in Vedic tradition — the minimum time required for deep cellular and neural transformation. Rishis began their tapasya for 40-day intervals. Ayappa devotees complete 41 days. You have touched that sacred threshold.
expected_changes: Emotional stability, reduced reactivity, spiritual sensitivity increasing, meditation deepening
message: Brahmacharya is listed first among the tapas of the body (shariram tapa) in Gita 17.14. For 40 days you have lived this tapas. Fire purifies gold — tapas purifies the soul.

title: Ardha-Shatak — Forty-Five
description: Three-quarters of the way to the great sixty. You can see the summit. The halfway point between a month and two months — where the transformation becomes self-sustaining.
expected_changes: Aura of calm noticeable to others, creative energy flowing powerfully, deep inner peace, reduced need for external validation
message: Uddhared atmanatmanam — let one lift oneself by oneself. For 45 days you have been your own best friend. Krishna says the self alone is its own friend or enemy. You chose friendship.

title: Shashthi Siddhi — Sixty Day Triumph
description: You have done what most cannot. Sixty days of continuous brahmacharya sadhana. This is not the end — this is the beginning of who you truly are. The identity has shifted.
expected_changes: Complete rewiring, unshakeable discipline, crystal clarity of purpose, others notice the transformation in your presence
message: Vihaya kaman yah sarvan — one who has abandoned all desires, who moves without attachment, without ego — that person attains peace. For 60 days, you have been that person.

title: Trimaas Tapasya — 90-Day Tapas
description: Three months. The ancient tapasyas lasted this long. Sage Vishwamitra performed tapas for years — your 90 days is your first great tapas. You have transmuted the grossest desire into ojas, tejas, and virya.
expected_changes: Mastery state — the practice is no longer effortful, it is who you are. Brahmacharya becomes your svabhava — your natural state.
message: Brahmacharya-pratisthayam virya-labhah. 90 days. The virya has built. The ojas shines. The tejas in your eyes is real. Now you know — this is not a practice anymore. This is you.
